parameters: There's an underpass that leads to the watchtower. It's filled with
enemy soldiers. You won't be able to get through.
I'm holding my breath. Don't talk to me.
I don't care who you are or what you're doing. I only care about
The archmages are the strongest of Maximus's magic users.
They treat us lowly mages like their workhorses.
The one I'm after arrogantly defiled my best friend's mind and body!
She killed herself last month, so I'll get revenge for her!
You... You took down the archmage for me. It made my heart feel
lighter to see him finally go down.
There are still many more of them out there, though. They spread
out to make sure they're not wiped out.
Well, one day I'll become an archmage myself! I'll destroy them all
Here, this is from me and my friend in heaven. Take it.
I managed to steal a forbidden scroll from Maximus's vault. I was
going to use it to put a death curse on those in the watchtower.
I was driven mad by my need for revenge. Looking back on it now,
I'm scared of the person I became.
Reflecting on how far I was willing to go... The thought of what
humans are capable of terrifies me.
There's a warm, glowing light. Fully restore the party?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
If the Ultra Beasts attack the watchtower, we slaves will use the
The audience seats are nice and comfortable, with strong magical
barriers around them. It's always the slaves who suffer.
Huh? You're going to defeat the Emperor and liberate Orphe?
Heh... What's with that crazy talk?
Wait, you're serious? Wow... Okay, take this with you.
The Ultra Beasts drop Spirit Stones sometimes. Maybe they eat them.
As long as they're not attacking people, they're actually pretty cute.
Shit! They got in through this tiny hole!? This wasn't here before!
We had to fill in tunnel the invaders dug! What a pain in the ass!
It was a small tunnel, but it ran all the way outside the tower.
And how'd they manage to get those roots to stabilize the entire
Down with the Emperor! Judgment will fall on those bloated
Incarnation of evil... I'll end you with my own hands... Guh...
If we don't take him down, the entire world will be...
So this is the true power of Maximus's archmages! We never should've
R-Run... We can't beat them! Run!
